title: Kung Pao Chicken
description: Authentic kung pao chicken with peanuts, dried chilies, and a complex sauce. Restaurant-quality at home!
instructions: Prepare sauce by mixing sugar, cornstarch, soy sauces, vinegar, stock, and water
Cut chicken into bite-sized pieces and marinate with cornstarch, white pepper, soy sauce, and Shaoxing wine for 10+ minutes
Heat wok and fry raw peanuts until golden, then remove and set aside
Fry dried chilies until fragrant, then remove and set aside
Add oil to wok and sear chicken in batches until cooked through
Stir-fry green onions, minced ginger, minced garlic, and Sichuan peppercorn
Return chicken to wok along with fried chilies and peanuts
Pour in prepared sauce and toss everything together
Cook until sauce thickens and coats the chicken, about 2 minutes
tips: Don't skip the marinating step - it tenderizes the chicken
Fry peanuts and chilies separately to control doneness
Sichuan peppercorn adds a unique numbing sensation
Have all ingredients prepped before cooking - stir fries cook fast!
